title: ReimbursementClaimHeader
description: Top-of-sheet claim metadata (rows 1–4 in the sample workbook). Line items are modeled separately.

fullName.description: Employee full name (paired with label FULL NAME).

peopleId.description: People / employee id (paired with label PEOPLE ID).

approver.description: Approver name(s); may be a long concatenated string in the template.

reimbursementCurrency.description: Claim-level reimbursement currency code, e.g. INR.

reimbursementAmount.description: Total reimbursement amount for the claim in reimbursementCurrency.

reimbursementDate.description: Claim reimbursement date (ISO-8601 date). The exported XLSX used a serial number in the cell; when writing to Sheets you may store as a date cell or as a serial depending on sheet formatting.
